response.justification: Sarah has strong full-stack engineering experience and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years in production-grade AI systems, vector databases, RAG architectures, or direct enterprise GenAI deployment — her work is more generalist and open-source focused, with limited documentation of cloud-native AI pipeline design or customer-facing technical leadership.
strengths: Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Strong full-stack proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud platforms (AWS CDK)
Demonstrated technical leadership through open-source projects and workshops
concerns: No explicit evidence of 8+ years building production AI systems; roles are broad and non-AI focused
Missing clear experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM optimization metrics
Limited documentation of customer-facing technical discovery or enterprise AI integration
